---
title: "Brand font-paths in a Typst book (#14511)"
include-in-header:
  text: |
    #set text(fallback: false)
_quarto:
  tests:
    typst:
      printsMessage:
        level: INFO
        regex: 'warning: unknown font family'
        negate: true
---

```{=typst}
#set text(font: "Amaranth")
Testing brand font-paths in a book project.
```
